steps.title: Use the advance-warning clue
steps.content: The corona provides an advance indication of solar flares, and the increased brightness appears before a flare. The blank must describe a flare that has not happened yet but is approaching.

steps.title: Match the time sequence
steps.content: Choice A would reverse the sequence by making the flare prior to the brightness. Choice C means harmless, which conflicts with flares interfering with telecommunications. Choice D means never-ending, which conflicts with the temporary warning pattern. The needed word means about to occur. The answer is B.
